2344710.name: Duckified: Cosmic Legends
2344710.description:
Duckified: Cosmic Legends is a side-scrolling, rhythm-based, action, musical, platformer game set across a wide variety of universes, timelines, and eras. Across 12 different and dynamic universes, players will battle, dance, race, and sing off against otherworldly demons, gigantic robotic megalomaniacs, an ancient deity turned businessman, a raging band of racing raccoons, a gross and all-consuming virus, and more.

"To defeat these ancient gods, myths, and rulers: you'll truly have to become... a legend."

In a retro-futuristic world, the royal Prince Joe Duck is enjoying his life of luxury, relaxation, and power. Until one day, when his evil twin brother, Jasper Duck, beckons him down underground, unveiling his newfound power.

After a heated battle, Joe is banished across the multiverse by his brother; forced to fight his way back, searching timelines for his power, meeting unlikely allies, facing his own fears, and working his way home to challenge his chaotic brother.


Duckified: Cosmic Legends has a stacked cast and crew behind it! As the game grows in development, the cast will too! So far, you can expect the likes of Branden Floyd, Isaac Pabon, Robin Nelson, John Whinfield, Robin van der Niet, Corey LeVier, and many many more! Each World of the game will also feature a guest composer, with Mathias Bard taking the helm as the lead composer of the game. You can check out more information regarding the cast and crew on the game's IMDb page.
2344710.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 瑞典语, 日语, 挪威语, 简体中文, 阿拉伯语, 保加利亚语, 捷克语, 丹麦语, 荷兰语, 芬兰语, 希腊语, 匈牙利语, 印度尼西亚语, 韩语, 波兰语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 罗马尼亚语, 俄语, 泰语, 繁体中文, 土耳其语, 乌克兰语, 越南语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
